title: Humanize AI Pro - Humanization Result Schema
description: JSON Schema for humanization results, AI detection scores, pattern matches, and batch results produced by Humanize AI Pro.

humanizationResult.description: Primary output of a humanization pass including original text, transformed text, and before/after scores

id.description: Unique humanization ID in format hum-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the humanization was performed

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the processed text

language_detected.description: Whether the language was auto-detected (true) or manually specified (false)

original.description: The original input text before humanization

humanized.description: The humanized output text after transformation

score_before.description: AI detection score of the original text

score_after.description: AI detection score of the humanized text (must be lower than score_before)

patterns_found.description: AI patterns detected in the original text

transformations_applied.description: Total number of text transformations applied

meaning_preserved.description: Verification that factual content was not altered

word_count_original.description: Word count of the original text

word_count_humanized.description: Word count of the humanized text

retry_count.description: Number of retries if initial humanization increased the AI score

tokens_used.description: Total tokens consumed during humanization (scan + transform + verify)

aiDetectionScore.description: Comprehensive AI detection score combining statistical metrics and pattern analysis

overall.description: Overall AI probability as a percentage (0=human, 100=AI-generated)

classification.description: Human-readable classification based on overall score thresholds

burstiness.description: Sentence length variance score (high=human-like, low=AI-like). Formula: std_dev(sentence_lengths) / mean(sentence_lengths)

type_token_ratio.description: Vocabulary diversity score: unique_words / total_words. Human range: 0.4-0.7, AI range: 0.6-0.9

perplexity.description: Relative perplexity estimate of next-word predictability. Human text: higher perplexity, AI text: lower perplexity

sentence_uniformity.description: How uniform sentence lengths are (0=highly varied, 1=perfectly uniform). AI text tends toward 0.6-1.0

vocabulary_richness.description: Measure of vocabulary diversity and naturalness. AI text often shows synonym overuse

pattern_count.description: Total number of known AI patterns detected in the text

dominant_model.description: Which AI model's patterns are most prevalent in the text

patternMatch.description: A single AI pattern detected in the text

pattern_id.description: Unique pattern identifier in format pat-{lang}-{number}

category.description: Category of the detected AI pattern

model.description: Which AI model this pattern is associated with

confidence.description: Confidence that this is genuinely an AI pattern (0=low, 1=certain)

original_text.description: The exact text span that matched the pattern

replacement.description: The humanized replacement text (null if score-only mode)

position.description: Location of the pattern in the original text

start.description: Character offset of the pattern start

end.description: Character offset of the pattern end

paragraph.description: Paragraph number where the pattern occurs

occurrences.description: Number of times this pattern appears in the text

scoreOnlyResult.description: Result of a score-only analysis (no transformation performed)

id.description: Unique score ID in format scr-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the scoring was performed

language.description: Detected or specified language of the input text

text_excerpt.description: First 200 characters of the analyzed text for identification

word_count.description: Word count of the analyzed text

patterns_found.description: AI patterns detected in the text

reliable.description: Whether the scoring is statistically reliable (false if text under 100 words)

tokens_used.description: Tokens consumed for the scoring analysis

batchResult.description: Aggregate result of batch processing multiple files in a directory

id.description: Unique batch ID in format bat-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the batch processing started

directory.description: Path to the directory that was batch processed

mode.description: Writing mode applied to all files in the batch

language.description: Language used for all files (auto-detect if not specified)

score_after.description: Overall AI score after humanization (null if failed)

score_improvement.description: Absolute point decrease in AI score (positive = improved)

patterns_found.description: Number of AI patterns detected in this file

aggregate_scores.description: Aggregate statistics across all processed files

total_files.description: Total number of files in the batch

failed.description: Number of files that failed processing

skipped.description: Number of files skipped (unsupported format or empty)

avg_score_before.description: Average AI score across all files before humanization

avg_score_after.description: Average AI score across successfully humanized files

avg_improvement.description: Average point decrease in AI score across successful files

total_patterns_found.description: Total AI patterns detected across all files

total_words_processed.description: Total word count across all processed files

dominant_model_detected.description: Most frequently detected AI model across the batch

total_tokens_used.description: Total tokens consumed across the entire batch

total_duration_ms.description: Total processing time for the entire batch
